pages.title: Making Instant Noodles
pages.text: To make instant noodles, you first need to put the following ingredients in your crafting table: deep fried noodles, a multifunctional wrapper pappeer, 0-7 ingredients. Next you make packaged instant noodles.
Prepare a Portable Pot and use the Packaged Instant Noodles in your inventory to right-click on the Portable Pot in order to place it in the pot.

Calcine the limestone to get quicklime, prepare a bucket of water and right click on the portable pot using quicklime and water in your inventory to place it in the pot. Then you get cooked instant noodles.
